name: Barbequed Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork chops with barbeque seasoning, garlic salt, celery salt.
2. Sprinkle paprika and a small amount of K.C. masterpiece sauce over the coals for 20 minutes at low heat.
3. Increase the grill heat to medium-high and cook the pork chops for about 40 minutes total, basting with the remaining K.C. masterpiece sauce during the last few minutes of cooking.
